name: FBC Holding, Inc.
summary: FBC Holding, Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating through its Bomb Factory division, focused on marketing and distributing exclusively licensed and patented extreme sports products. Its flagship product is the FBC Flowboard, a 14-wheel skateboard with a patented Deep Carve System retailing at $89.99. The company also licenses the Snowskate and Snowchuck products, targeting extreme sports enthusiasts in specialty and mass retail channels.

products.name: FBC Flowboard
products.description: 14-wheel skateboard with patented Deep Carve System allowing 45-degree carving turns, retails at $89.99, available in 32-inch and 36-inch models.

products.name: Snowskate
products.description: Skateboard that converts to a snowskate by swapping wheels for patent-pending skis fitting on existing truck sets.

products.name: Snowchuck
products.description: Patented snowball maker and launcher allowing one-handed snowball making and throwing without hand getting cold.

products.name: DuoRail
products.description: Unique rail system for skateboarders that instantly switches from round to flat top rail, developed by Kevin Wright.

partnerships.description: Exclusive licensing rights to develop, market and sell Flowboard, Flow Saucer, and Snowskate products, formalized November 21, 2012.
Consulting agreement for development, marketing and sale of licensed extreme sports products; Kern serves as VP of Marketing and Distribution.
Affiliation through COO Kevin Wright, who sells skateboards and apparel through AiroUSA, a Colorado corporation.
